description: major river in central United States
description_wiki: The Missouri River is a river in the Central and Mountain West regions of the United States.

description: city in and county seat of Chouteau County, Montana, United States
description_wiki: Fort Benton is a city in and the county seat of Chouteau County, Montana, United States.

aliases: Blackfeet Tribe of the Blackfeet Indian Reservation
Blackfeet Tribe of the Blackfeet Indian Reservation of Montana
description: federally recognized tribe of indigenous people in North America
description_wiki: The Blackfeet Nation (Blackfoot: Aamsskáápipikani / ǎmssk̇ǎaṗiiṗiik̇ǔni, Pikuni / ṗiik̇ǔni), officially named the Blackfeet Tribe of the Blackfeet Indian Reservation of Montana, is a federally recognized tribe of Siksikaitsitapi people with an Indian reservation in Montana.

description: mountain man of the American Old West. (1824–1900)
description_wiki: John "Liver-Eating" Johnson, born John Jeremiah Garrison Johnston (July 1, 1824 – January 21, 1900), was a mountain man of the American Old West.

description: state of the United States of America
description_wiki: Alaska (  ə-LASS-kə) is a non-contiguous U.S. state located in the northwestern regions of North America.

description: new discovery of gold that brings an onrush of miners seeking their fortune
description_wiki: A gold rush or gold fever is a discovery of gold—sometimes accompanied by other precious metals and rare-earth minerals—that brings an onrush of miners seeking their fortune.

description: mountain in the Rocky Mountains, Colorado, United States
description_wiki: Pikes Peak or America's Mountain is an ultra-prominent fourteener of the Front Range of the Rocky Mountains of North America.

description: glacial valley in California, United States of America
description_wiki: Yosemite Valley ( yoh-SEM-ə-tee; Yosemite, Miwok for "killer") is a glacial valley in Yosemite National Park in the western Sierra Nevada mountains of Central California, United States.

description: state of the United States of America
description_wiki: Indiana (  IN-dee-AN-ə) is a state in the Midwestern region of the United States.
